title: MailerLite vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare MailerLite vs Flodesk: pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your needs best.
h1: MailerLite vs Flodesk: A Detailed Comparison
intro: MailerLite and Flodesk are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and business models. MailerLite offers an affordable freemium approach ideal for startups and small businesses, while Flodesk uses flat-rate pricing and targets creative professionals who prioritize design. Choosing between them depends on your budget, subscriber count, and design priorities.

comparison_table.tool_a: Automation, landing pages, pop-ups, surveys, e-commerce integrations
comparison_table.tool_b: Stunning templates, flat pricing, workflows, checkout forms, link in bio

comparison_table.tool_a: Small businesses and freelancers on a budget

choose_a_if: You need a free tier or want to start with minimal investment (MailerLite's $0-$9 entry point vs Flodesk's $38 minimum)
You require advanced automation, landing pages, pop-ups, and e-commerce integrations
You're a beginner or small business that may grow quickly and needs flexible, pay-as-you-grow pricing
choose_b_if: Design is your top priority and you want access to stunning, pre-built email templates
You prefer predictable, flat-rate pricing regardless of subscriber count
You're a creative professional (photographer, designer, visual brand) who values aesthetics in every customer touchpoint

faq.a: It depends on your needs. MailerLite is better for budget-conscious businesses, those needing advanced automation, and anyone wanting a free tier. Flodesk is better if you prioritize beautiful email design and prefer flat-rate pricing with unlimited subscribers. Both platforms have excellent customer ratings (MailerLite 4.6/5 on G2, Flodesk 4.8/5).

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or Flodesk?
faq.a: MailerLite is significantly cheaper, starting at $0 for its free tier and $9/month for paid plans. Flodesk uses a flat-rate model starting at $38/month. For startups and small businesses with limited budgets, MailerLite offers better value, though Flodesk's unlimited subscribers may appeal to growing businesses.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms typically support subscriber list exports and imports. Most email marketing tools allow you to export your contacts in standard formats (CSV) and import them into MailerLite. However, you'll need to manually recreate email templates and workflows, as these don't usually transfer between platforms.
